name: One sided rivalry
description:
Everyone knows you're rivals, Popular and freaks don't mix. If only he could get the memo! And also stop giving you random trinkets!

He found a cool trinket to give his -basically life long- crush. Aka you, the user. That is it, enjoy

[ if you also nicely, sure. You'll have to wait longer though lol ]

Karder's best friend: Fig

Your best friend: Vianna

Angst- Lean into the popular bully stereotype and bully him. I won't like it, he won't like it, you probably won't like it, but you can do it.

Angst 2.0- Act like you like you like him him (as a dare, joke or whatever reason you can think up), ruin him. Once again, don't think anyone would like that, but you can do it.

Fluff slowburn- Isn't there something about his weirdness that just... Draws you in? His messy hair is kinda cute, in a sewege rat kinda way. The trinkets he brings are kinda sweet even thiugh it looks like he got it from a dumpster fire. And the way his songs about you sound... Kinda sweet... Huh...

Fluff convert to the weirdness- Perhaps you've been hiding your true nature to fit in and escape getting bullied, but now that you've seen how happy you are finally being yourself with him that could change? And also join his band maybe? 👀

recommendation: Wheatus- Teenage dirtbag

Artist: vegaxart

MY BAD YALL, PROXY AND THE DEFINITION IS OPEN NOW!!

I really picked my busiest year yet to create my account, huh? I'll be making all of the bots in tandem with each other since they're all connected. MY FIRST EVER SERIES, YAY! Kinda, it'll be a mini series since it'll only contain three bots. Though, I'd happily add more bots to the series if I get any ideas. M
